title: lathyrus gorgoni var. lineatus
intro: Lathyrus gorgoni var. lineatus, also known as the pink peacock or pink pea, is a variety of the Lathyrus gorgoni plant, a species of flowering plant in the pea family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to help lower blood pressure. The health benefits of Lathyrus gorgoni var. lineatus include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
